command: Write-Output '=== .env variable names (no values) ==='; $envPath = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\.env'; if (Test-Path $envPath) { Get-Content $envPath | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^([^#=]+)=') { $name = $Matches[1].Trim(); $val = ($_ -split '=',2)[1].Trim(); $len = $val.Length; Write-Output "$name = [${len} chars]" } } } else { Write-Output '.env NOT FOUND' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Check media-pipeline/input/ for stuck images ==='; $inputPath = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\input'; if (Test-Path $inputPath) { $files = Get-ChildItem $inputPath -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($files) { $files | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table } else { Write-Output 'input/ is empty (no images waiting)' } } else { Write-Output 'input/ directory not found locally' }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== Capture recent stderr from media_bridge.py PID 6320 ==='; $proc = Get-Process -Id 6320 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($proc) { Write-Output "Process running: $($proc.ProcessName) CPU=$($proc.CPU) WS=$([math]::Round($proc.WorkingSet64/1MB,1))MB StartTime=$($proc.StartTime)" } else { Write-Output 'PID 6320 NOT RUNNING!' }
description: Check .env variables, stuck images, and process health
